description: Show Claude Code subscription usage in the status bar (current session remaining, weekly limits, reset times).
command.refresh.title: Claude Usage: Refresh now
config.refreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds. The endpoint is aggressively rate-limited, so the minimum is 180s.
config.show.description: Which metrics to show in the status bar text (full details are always in the hover tooltip).
config.show.session: Show only the current session (5h) remaining
config.show.sessionWeekly: Show both current session (5h) and weekly (7d) remaining
config.resetStyle.description: How reset times are shown in the status bar.
